description:
Health.md turns your Apple Health data into a beautiful, searchable fitness and wellness journal in Markdown — automatically synced to Obsidian or any folder you choose.

HOW IT WORKS
• Connect once to Apple Health
• Choose which health metrics to track and export (sleep, HRV, steps, heart rate, and 60+ more)
• Health.md writes a daily Markdown note — your personal health log — formatted exactly how you want it
• Notes land in your Obsidian vault, iCloud Drive, or any local folder

WHAT YOU CAN EXPORT
• Sleep — total, deep, REM, core, awake, time in bed
• Heart — HRV (daily average), resting heart rate, walking heart rate, average/min/max HR, heart rate recovery
• Activity — steps, distance, active energy, exercise minutes, VO2 max, stand time
• Body — weight, BMI, body fat, lean body mass, waist circumference
• Vitals — respiratory rate, blood oxygen, body temperature, wrist temperature, blood pressure, blood glucose
• Nutrition — calories, protein, carbs, fat, fiber, sugar, sodium, cholesterol, and more
• Mindfulness, symptoms, reproductive health, and dozens of additional categories

OBSIDIAN NATIVE
Health.md is the health tracker built for Obsidian users. Daily notes use your existing template, insert into the right folder, and support Obsidian Bases (YAML frontmatter properties) so your health data becomes queryable in Obsidian's database views.

FLEXIBLE FORMATTING
• Choose metric names and units
• Pick daily, weekly, or manual export schedules
• Use date placeholders in folder paths ({year}, {month}, {quarter}, {week})
• Export as Markdown, CSV, JSON, or Obsidian Bases YAML

PRIVACY
Health.md is strictly local. Your health data never leaves your device — no servers, no accounts, no analytics. All processing happens on-device and files are written directly to the folder you select.

Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
whatsNew:
Health.md can now preserve the original detail behind your Apple Health data—not just daily totals—giving you a more complete, portable archive in JSON and CSV.

New
• Lossless Health Records captures individual samples and their source, device, timestamps, metadata, and relationships across workouts, sleep, nutrition, medications, blood pressure, clinical records, attachments, and more.
• Export schema v7 adds explicit capture results and warnings, so missing permissions, unavailable records, and partial exports no longer look complete.

Improved
• Lossless Health Records is on by default for new installs. Existing choices are preserved.
• JSON provides the complete source archive, CSV includes the same canonical records, and Markdown and Obsidian Bases remain readable daily summaries.
• Individual Entry Tracking now uses original HealthKit record identities whenever available.

Fixed
• Corrected VO2 Max summaries, Stand Time and Stand Hours, vitamin and mineral units, blood-pressure pairing, and calendar-timezone roll-ups.
• Improved permission recovery and made connected iPhone-to-Mac exports safer and more reliable.
